chunks.text: The server has encountered a problem because access is restricted. Your request was: https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~amypavel/. What are you looking for? Graduate Applications & Information, Undergraduate EECS and CS Course Requirements, Transfer & Admissions Information, How to post job, conference and other outside announcements to the EECS Department, EECS Departmental Computer or Network Support, People, Contact Us.
chunks.question: What is the reason for the access restriction on the page?
chunks.answer: The server encountered a restricted access problem.

chunks.text: To contact the owner of the specific page you were looking for, send an email to: amypavel@eecs. To report problems or submit questions and comments related to the site, please send an email to the following email address: webteam AT EECS.Berkeley.EDU.
chunks.question: How can you contact the page owner or report site issues?
chunks.answer: Email amypavel@eecs or webteam AT EECS.Berkeley.EDU.
